// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Conditional
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal partial class StaticData
{

    private static char GetCharAt(string str, int index) => str[index];
    private static char GetCharFromEnd(string str, int fromEnd) => str[str.Length - 1 - fromEnd];
    private static int GetLength(string str) => str.Length;

    
    public bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int getLength;
        char getCharFromEnd;
        char getCharAt;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharFromEnd = GetCharFromEnd(key, 0);
        if ((getCharFromEnd > '3'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharAt = GetCharAt(key, 0);
        if ((getCharAt > 'i'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getCharAt < 'i'))
        {
         return false;
        }



        switch (key)
        {
            case "item1":
            case "item2":
            case "item3":
                return true;
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }
    
    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 5;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 5;
    public const bool HasNumber = true;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
